citations_valid.parenthetical: the ESI protocol should make clear that hyperlinked documents are not treated as conventional attachments for purposes of preserving a 'family' relationship in production
the Court does not agree that a hyperlinked document is an attachment

citations_valid.cited_case_name: In re Meta Pixel Healthcare Litig.
citations_valid.parenthetical: the Court anticipates that for some documents, it will be important to collect (or attempt to collect) hyperlinked documents and associate them with the underlying ESI in which the links appear. In such circumstances, the parties should consider reasonable requests for production of hyperlinked documents on a case-by-case basis. Such requests should not be made as a matter of
